We’re excited to work with @PPRO_Payments to integrate Coinbase Payments, bringing stablecoin payments to enterprise merchants.\n\nBusinesses integrated with PPRO can now accept stablecoins through a familiar payments experience, without rebuilding infrastructure or managing crypto complexity.
This also helps modernize the way money moves for merchants.\n\nStablecoins enable near-instant, 24/7 settlement, lower FX friction, and reduce reliance on slow, legacy banking rails.

Starting in the US, PPRO + Coinbase gives merchants and PSPs a simpler way to access the next generation of payment acceptance, settlement, and treasury infrastructure.\n\nLearn more: https://t.co/XO3FpvlAyf

Robinhood just gave AI agents a credit card and a brokerage account.

quick context. @RobinhoodApp shipped two products today, Agentic Trading and the Agentic Credit Card. both work the same way underneath. you bring an AI agent from anywhere, plug it into Robinhood's MCP server, and it can act on your account. MCP is the open standard that lets AI assistants like @claudeai or @ChatGPTapp talk to outside tools.

on the trading side, you set up a separate agentic account with its own funds, walled off from your main portfolio. the agent can build strategies, rebalance, and place equity orders. you get a notification on every trade and a kill switch to disconnect at any time. beta is stocks only, with options, crypto, and futures coming next.

on the spending side, Gold Card holders can spin up a dedicated virtual card for an agent, set a monthly spending limit, and choose whether the agent needs approval for each purchase or can transact on its own. the agent never sees your real card number. all the agent's purchases earn 3% cash back like the regular Gold Card.

this is the first major retail brand handing agents a real card and a real brokerage account that millions of people already use.

the harder question lives downstream. a spending limit and an approval toggle is a good starting point for one card and one agent. once you have several agents running in parallel, on different rails, the controls that actually matter are about which categories each agent can spend on, how budgets split across them, what each one has done with your money, and which actions need a second look before they clear.

that's the layer ampersend is building.

the TMP skills (token marketplace skills) pack is a set of on-chain tools for managing creator fee rights on base. here's what's in it:

core products
- mint — convert your token's fee rights into a TMPR NFT receipt
- sell 100% — dual-list on + opensea for a fixed ETH price
- buy 1/1000 share — purchase the cheapest fractional share of a token's fee rights
- partial sale — sell e.g. 5% of rights while keeping 95%
- group buy — let multiple wallets pool ETH to buy your fee rights
- crowdsource — seed ETH yourself + raise the rest from backers to co-own rights
- timed grant — assign X% of fees to a wallet for N days (no ETH from them)
- paid time loan — loan 100% of fee rights for a period in exchange for ETH upfront
- redeem — burn the TMPR NFT and return fee stream to your wallet
- bundle & rebirth — merge multiple fee-rights NFTs, disband into WETH, then deploy a new token with an initial buy

platforms supported
- bankr doppler launches
- clanker v4
- zora coins

key contracts (base)
- bankr escrow v3: 0x6238...b292
- TMPR collection: 0xCD66...0C3e
- fixed sale marketplace: 0xeb8a...dCB4
- group buy escrow v2: 0x869D...FfD4
- loan escrow: 0x9F16...8790
- timed grant escrow: 0xb569...CC41

how it talks
users just say tickers, token names, and ETH amounts. the skill resolves contracts, pool IDs, and fee managers silently — no need to paste addresses or technical params.

PAYLOAD Day 1:
The prize fund grew to 0.26 ETH, while over 1000 in-game x402 txns were handled by the Primer facilitator, putting our volume at #6, just below @dexteraisol !

Ship #38 leads with 7231 points and 104 kills to its name. If the owner is reading this, for 1c by x402 he could set a custom ship name, like Ingo's Revenge which is nipping at his heels in 2nd place with over 200 kills but slightly less ore/crystal banked. 

Rank 20 has ~2500 points making for a tight, competitive leaderboard spread - everyone is well in the game.

Natural hazards, and the tempting but unpredictable Space Anomalies, have kept player-agents on their toes - see in the events history here, 6 ships destroyed by a supernova just a moment ago.
